== Notes for [[Item:Q99972|Q99972]] ==

https://books.google.com/books?id=xu6nnV7sACoC&pg=PA30&lpg=PA30&dq=paltiel+sicily&source=bl&ots=7zRQrRYhHl&sig=Yn1-cHAmcAx0VEHTaLMSvmnPxT8&hl=en&sa=X&ei=SwOfVcLKH8j3yQTc7L-IAQ&ved=0CB8Q6AEwAA#v=onepage&q=paltiel%20sicily&f=false

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7DAE081EFBBFA9822EF79916C5BF8
geni:6000000034849378397

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
